variant.name: .ManagementPage.Blank
variant.summary: the Management Page (+ Add button, empty fields)

variant.name: .ManagementPage.Prefilled
variant.summary: the Management Page (editing a user skill)

variant.name: .WebClient.Prefilled
variant.summary: the WebClient (save as skill / editing user skill)

histogram.name: Skills.Dialog.{DialogType}{EntryPointAndState}.Action
histogram.summary: Records user actions (e.g., Save, Cancel, Refine) specifically within the Skills {DialogType} dialog. Invoked from {EntryPointAndState}.

histogram.name: Skills.Downloader.FirstParty.FetchResult
histogram.summary: Records the result status (success, network error, parse error, etc.) of a first-party skills download attempt.

histogram.name: Skills.Downloader.FirstParty.HttpResponseCode
histogram.summary: The HTTP response code received when downloading skills.

histogram.name: Skills.Invoke.Action
histogram.summary: Records executions of Skills, categorized by the skill source.

histogram.name: Skills.Invoke.Result
histogram.summary: Records the terminal outcome (success or specific error state) of invoking a Skill via the Glic panel. This metric is used to calculate availability and reliability SLOs. Specific failure states include panel timeouts and requests for skills that no longer exist (e.g., deleted via sync).

histogram.name: Skills.Management.Error
histogram.summary: Records errors encountered during skills management operations (e.g., service not ready, skill not found).

histogram.name: Skills.Management.FirstParty.DownloadRequestStatus
histogram.summary: Records the status of a skills download request (success, already running, timeout).

histogram.name: Skills.Management.{Page}.Action
histogram.summary: Records user actions on the Skills {Page}, such as adding, editing, or deleting skills.

histogram.name: Skills.Refine.Result
histogram.summary: Records the terminal outcome of refining a Skill prompt using a server-side ML model. Tracks successful execution, model failures, protobuf parse errors, and cases where the model returns an empty suggestion list. Used to monitor feature health and model reliability.

histogram.name: Skills.Save.Result
histogram.summary: Records the terminal outcome of saving a new Skill or updating an existing one. Failure states differentiate between database/sync errors, initialization states (service not ready), and cases where the UI context is lost (dialog closed) before the save operation completes.

histogram.name: Skills.UserSkills.Count
histogram.summary: Records the total number of skills a user possesses per profile. Used to measure adoption depth over time. This metric is recorded, potentially multiple times (once per profile) with every UMA log by SkillsMetricsProvider.
